items.name: Flint
items.description: Tensor math framework for machine learning

items.name: system-emulator
items.description: A comprehensive framework for modeling complex systems, executing sandboxed operations, machine learning predictions, and optimizing multi-agent objectives.

items.name: urban-infrastructure-satelite-imagery
items.description: This project presents a machine learning framework for extracting urban infrastructure information from high-resolution satellite imagery. The objective is to automatically classify road and building pixels using feature engineering and supervised machine learning techniques.

items.name: Predicting_Gold_Movement
items.description: Developed a machine learning framework to predict short-term gold price movements by combining SPDR Gold Shares (GLD) historical market data with news sentiment features. Extracted and analyzed large-scale financial news signals to evaluate their impact on predictive performance and market trends.

items.name: seu-injection-framework
items.description: A Framework for Developing Robust Machine Learning Models in Harsh Environments

items.name: ML-Enhanced-Option-Pricing
items.description: Machine-learning enhanced option pricing framework with IV surface modeling, residual correction, explainability analysis, and interactive Streamlit dashboard.

items.name: MLServer
items.description: An inference server for your machine learning models, including support for multiple frameworks, multi-model serving and more

items.name: Supervised-Machine-Learning
items.description: This repository contains an end-to-end Machine Learning classification framework designed to analyze whether an individual has developed an Imaginary Companion (IC) based on their self-reported psychometric and psychological health scores.

items.name: customer-state-transition-prediction
items.description: A temporal state-aware machine learning framework for customer behavioural state transition prediction, purchase propensity modelling, and marketing analytics using Olist and UCI Online Retail datasets.

items.name: student-success-ai-framework
items.description: Machine learning and deep learning framework for predicting student persistence and academic success using the Open University Learning Analytics Dataset (OULAD), with future applications to STEM retention, early-alert systems, and NSF SPARC6 student success initiatives.

items.name: Exocortex-Protocol
items.description: Causal Machine Learning Framework for Cognitive Load Assessment

items.name: credit-portfolio-risk-optimization
items.description: An end-to-end analytics framework for retail credit decisioning that balances risk and profitability. It combines machine learning, financial metrics, and policy simulation to maximize expected portfolio value under risk constraints, reflecting real-world challenges faced by senior banking analytics teams.

items.name: IPMF-PdM-Framework
items.description: Code for "An Intelligent Predictive Maintenance Framework Using Machine Learning for Smart Manufacturing Environments" – LSTM autoencoder, 1D-CNN with attention, and LSTM-XGBoost for RUL prediction (C-MAPSS FD001).

items.name: MultiScaleArrays.jl
items.description: A framework for developing multi-scale arrays for use in scientific machine learning (SciML) simulations

items.name: policyholder-risk-predictions
items.description: Machine learning framework for insurance claim prediction and policyholder risk scoring

items.name: SIRT1_ML_NPASS
items.description: An integrative machine learning, explainable AI, and molecular simulation framework for the discovery of selective SIRT1 inhibitors against Triple Negative Breast Cancer

items.name: 1089-Master-Thesis-2026
items.description: Master Thesis 2026: Security and Robustness of Automated Credit Decision Algorithms. This repository contains the complete implementation of machine learning-based credit scoring systems, adversarial attack simulations, robustness metrics, defense mechanisms, and evaluation framework developed at Aalborg University.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Based-Multi-Classifier-System-for-Antibiotic-Resistance-Prediction
items.description: Developed a machine learning framework for antibiotic resistance gene classification using transformer-based DNA embeddings, feature selection, and predictive modeling. The system supports real-time ARG detection through a Streamlit web application.

items.name: ai_assessment_implementation_resources
items.description: This repository collects practical resources for assessing, testing, documenting, and implementing responsible machine learning systems, including frameworks, evaluation tools, educational materials, and community guidance.

items.name: FW_XFL
items.description: The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

items.name: VMDragonSlayer
items.description: Automated multi-engine framework for unpacking, analyzing, and devirtualizing binaries protected by commercial and custom Virtual Machine based protectors. Combines Dynamic Taint Tracking, Symbolic Execution, Pattern & Semantic Classification, and Machine Learning–driven prioritization to dramatically reduce manual reverse engineering time.

items.name: ML_Driven_TalentIdentification_In_Youth_Chess
items.description: The purpose of this study is to develop and evaluate a machine-learning-based talent identification framework for Indian youth chess players using FIDE rating history and FIDE rating-calculation data.

items.name: tax-compliance-risk-prediction
items.description: TaxGuard proposes a hybrid machine learning framework that integrates unsupervised and supervised techniques to: detect anomalies in corporate tax returns

items.name: ml-framework
items.description: A barebones, numpy implementation of a Machine Learning framework

items.name: birdclef-2026
items.description: The goal of this repo is to develop machine learning frameworks capable of identifying understudied species within continuous audio data from Brazil's Pantanal wetlands.

items.name: VIPER
items.description: VIPER (VUS Interpretation using Probabilistic Evidence and Random Forest) - A machine learning framework for predictive interpretation of VUS in hereditary cancer genomics using ClinVar and VEP variant-level annotations

items.name: SmartAI-773
items.description: Open-source AI toolkit for machine learning and deep learning.

items.name: GOAL
items.description: GOAL (General Open Atomistic Laboratory) is a Python framework for training machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) on atomistic systems.

items.name: scalable-mlops-infrastructure-ci-cd-framework-
items.description: Developed an end-to-end MLOps pipeline for continuous integration, deployment, and monitoring of machine learning models using AWS, Kubernetes, and open-source technologies, ensuring scalable, reproducible, and maintainable workflows.

items.name: ARTIST
items.description: A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

items.name: Nirf_Ranking_Analysis
items.description: A machine learning project to reverse-engineer, analyze, and predict the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) scores and ranks of IIITD. This research focuses on parameters like Financial Resources Utilization (FRU), Footprint of Projects, Professional (FPPP), and Intellectual Property Rights (IPR).

items.name: FinTech-Portfolio
items.description: This repository contains an advanced financial data analytics framework that implements predictive modeling and unsupervised machine learning algorithms on global equities.

items.name: nickel_indonesia
items.description: NLP analysis of 2,700+ news articles (2014–2025) examining how conflicts around Chinese investment in Indonesia's nickel sector are framed using the Narrative Policy Framework. Combines manual annotation with machine learning to identify narrative roles (villain/victim/hero) and conflict types

items.name: drift-demo
items.description: drift-demo is a fully self-contained Python framework that simulates, detects, and responds to machine-learning data drift in a streaming environment. In real-world deployments, models trained on historical data gradually degrade in performance as the real-world distribution of inputs and labels shifts over time - a phenomenon called drift

items.name: Malware_Detection
items.description: This project is a web based malware detection system developed using machine learning and the Streamlit framework. It analyzes uploaded files and predicts whether a file is safe or malware using a Random Forest model trained on Windows PE file features for academic demonstration purposes.

items.name: Google-Advance-Data-Analytics-Capstone-Project
items.description: This is an end-to-end data analytics and machine learning capstone project designed to predict employee attrition. Using the PACE framework, the notebook guides the user through cleaning an HR dataset, conducting exploratory data analysis (EDA), and preparing to build predictive models to understand why employees leave

items.name: nnpdf
items.description: An open-source machine learning framework for global analyses of parton distributions.

items.name: Project---Rainwater-Harvesting
items.description: An ML-driven framework designed to forecast urban water requirements and assess reservoir storage capacities. Developed by IT students at D.Y. Patil University, this project uses machine learning and sensor data to optimize distribution and combat global water scarcity driven by climate change and urbanization.

items.name: black-box-ranking-audit
items.description: An algorithmic audit framework that combines machine learning surrogate modeling, SHAP explainability, and automated inferential change-point discovery to detect and localize hidden, non-linear penalties within a black-box marketplace ranking engine.

items.name: Explainable-ECG-Cardiac-Risk-COLAB
items.description: A research-driven lightweight Edge-AI framework for early cardiac risk prediction from ECG signals. This project focuses on ECG preprocessing, interpretable feature extraction, and efficient machine learning models for accurate and real-time cardiovascular risk assessment on edge devices.

items.name: MLJ.jl
items.description: A Julia machine learning framework

items.name: MetaMorph
items.description: MetaMorph is an open-source framework that leverages the power of Large Language Models (LLMs) to process, extract, and transform messy, unstructured, or heterogeneous columns of metadata into structured, machine-readable formats to enhance machine learning pipelines and predictive models across any domain.

items.name: Mental-Health-Classifier
items.description: Repositorio destinado a el análisis, entrenamiento y despliegue de un modelo de machine learning, con el objetivo de la clasificacion de pensamientos / textos de problemeas de salud mental,especificamente sobre el suicidio. Ademas de base para framework de multientrenamiento, compartacion e inteligencia.

items.name: SmartAI-471
items.description: Open-source AI toolkit for machine learning and deep learning.

items.name: machine-learning-specialization
items.description: A comprehensive repository containing my personal implementations, math derivations, and custom Google Colab notebooks for the DeepLearning.AI Deep Learning Specialization. Built from scratch using NumPy and TensorFlow to master deep linear algebra frameworks, computer vision algorithms, and modern sequence models

items.name: ML-Physical-Therapy-Optimization
items.description: Machine learning framework for optimizing rotator cuff rehabilitation using sEMG signals, LOSO validation, XGBoost, and constrained optimization.

items.name: sagemaker-distribution
items.description: A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

items.name: Imbalance-Credit-Risk-Analysis-Interpretable-Machine-Learning
items.description: Predicting Loan Default Probabilities Using WoE+LR Scorecard and XGBoost+SHAP Frameworks on Credit Data

items.description: Open-source AI toolkit for machine learning and deep learning.

items.name: sec-aaer-accounting-risk-screening
items.description: Reproducible machine-learning and DeepCut-inspired neural thresholding framework for SEC accounting enforcement risk screening using public 10-K and 10-Q financial statements linked to AAER releases.

items.name: caretSDM
items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

items.name: The-Agentic-Researcher
items.description: A practical framework for AI-Assisted Research in Mathematics and Machine Learning

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: pfe-pentesting-framework
items.description: Data-Driven Pentesting Framework - Projet PFE cybersécurité et machine learning

items.name: EEG-Behavior-Fusion-Driver-Risk-Clustering
items.description: AI-powered driver risk profiling system that combines EEG-based emotion recognition and telematics-based driving behavior analysis using machine learning. The framework generates personalized risk scores and clusters drivers into Safe, Caution, and Risky categories for proactive road safety monitoring.

items.name: FRIS-Predictive-Risk-Framework
items.description: Financial Risk Intelligence System (FRIS): A modular machine learning framework developed for New England College to predict student loan default risk, optimize institutional retention, and ensure federal compliance. https://huggingface.co/spaces/GlauberFR/FRIS-v3

items.name: Physics-Guided-ML-for-Optimized-Grid-Generation-in-Rarefied-Hypersonic-Flows-7
items.description: A boundary condition–based machine learning (BCML) framework is developed for rarefied hypersonic flow-field prediction and mesh generation around re-entry bluff bodies. Trained on DSMC data, BCML predicts flow properties and generates mean-free-path-based meshes, reducing cell count and computational cost while maintaining accuracy."

items.name: Foam-Agent
items.description: Foam-Agent: An end-to-end, composable multi-agent framework for automating CFD simulations in OpenFOAM. NeurIPS 2025 Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences Workshop.

items.name: Glioblastoma-risk-modelling
items.description: Developed a machine learning framework for glioma progression risk prediction using longitudinal multi-modal MRI scans and clinical data. The model combines CNN, LSTM, and clinical features to analyze tumor evolution over time, enabling early risk assessment, personalized treatment planning, and improved clinical decision-making.

items.name: MutaGenX
items.description: Machine learning framework for mutation pathogenicity prediction using sequence-derived and structural descriptors.

items.name: Probabilistic-Fetal-Brain-Age-Estimation-Pipeline-Audit
items.description: Clinical Machine Learning and Deep Learning frameworks for Healthcare applications.

items.name: streamlit
items.description: Streamlit is an open-source Python framework that makes it easy to build and share beautiful, custom web apps for machine learning and data science. With Streamlit, you can turn data scripts into shareable web applications in minutes without needing front-end experience.

items.name: scalable-inference-serving
items.description: A collection of APIs, frameworks, and platforms for scalable machine learning model inference serving, deployment, and management.

items.name: pytorch
items.description: APIs and resources for PyTorch, an open source machine learning framework for tensor computation and deep learning developed by Meta.

items.name: google-tensorflow
items.description: Google TensorFlow is an open-source machine learning framework providing APIs and tools for building, training, and deploying ML models, including TensorFlow Serving for model inference and TensorFlow Hub for reusable model components.

items.name: apache-mahout
items.description: Apache Mahout is an open-source framework for building scalable machine learning applications.

items.name: suicidal-intent-prediction-smote-enc-shap
items.description: Code for the paper "Construction of Interpretable Machine Learning Prediction Framework and Identification of Influence Factors for Suicidal Intent Under Imbalanced Data Conditions". Implements SMOTE-ENC data augmentation, 6 machine learning models, and SHAP interpretability analysis for college student suicidal ideation screening.

items.name: neurocrypt
items.description: Proof-of-concept framework for privacy-preserving machine learning inference using Fully Homomorphic Encryption (CKKS). Implements encrypted linear inference using TenSEAL with a strict client-server separation model.

items.name: sktime
items.description: A unified framework for machine learning with time series

items.name: machinelearning
items.description: ML.NET is an open source and cross-platform machine learning framework for .NET.

items.name: Prompt-Security-Engine-Hybrid-ML-DistilBERT-Framework-for-Prompt-Attack-Detection-and-Classification
items.description: A hybrid machine learning and DistilBERT-based prompt security framework for detecting jailbreaks, harmful requests, copyright violations, and policy bypass attacks in Large Language Models, featuring explainable AI, drift detection, and FastAPI deployment.

items.name: Gait-Analysis
items.description: An angle calculator that is based on google's open source machine learning framework "mediapipe" that takes in a footage of a person walking and calculates different types of angles at each frame throughout the video. This is necessary for physicians to diagnose certain locomative related diseases.

items.description: Airline Passenger Satisfaction analysis using the CRISP-DM framework. End-to-end machine learning project focusing on customer data analytics.

items.description: AI-enhanced IEC 62443 risk assessment framework for oil and gas ICS security using Python, Flask, threat intelligence, and machine learning.

items.name: mercury-explainability
items.description: mercury-explainability is a library with implementations of different state-of-the-art methods in the field of explainability. They are designed to work efficiently and to be easily integrated with the main Machine Learning frameworks.

items.name: Graph-Based-AML-Framework
items.description: A research-driven AML framework that investigates the effectiveness of graph neural networks, classical machine learning, and heterophily-aware architectures for detecting illicit activity in cryptocurrency transaction networks.

items.name: matbench-discovery
items.description: An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.

items.name: tyr
items.description: A dependently-typed machine learning framework for Lean 4, providing compile-time tensor shape verification.

items.name: CFST-Capacity-Prediction
items.description: A robust machine learning framework for predicting the axial load capacity of Concrete-Filled Steel Tubular (CFST) columns. The project utilizes XGBoost optimized with Optuna and provides interpretability via SHAP values to analyze feature importance compared to existing benchmarks.

items.name: accord-net-framework
items.description: Machine learning, computer vision, statistics and general scientific computing for .NET

items.name: MaterialsFramework
items.description: A modular Python framework for deploying, benchmarking, and analyzing state-of-the-art machine learning potentials and simulation workflows in materials science.

items.description: Graph analytics and machine learning framework for identifying synthetic identities through relationship analysis, behavioral patterns, and risk-based scoring.

items.name: credit-card-fraud-detection-package
items.description: Real-time fraud detection framework leveraging machine learning, behavioral analytics, anomaly detection, and explainable AI for payment transaction monitoring.

items.name: Causal_ML_Literature_Review_Data_Analyses
items.description: R/RDS-based data pipeline and analysis framework for a causal machine learning literature review in oncology, including paper metadata, framework scores, evidence excerpts, and joined analysis tables.

items.name: ml-marketing-campaing-opt
items.description: Built a machine learning framework to estimate the causal impact of promotional campaigns on customer, purchasing behavior. Trained separate Random Forest models for treatment and control populations, calculating customer-level uplift scores to optimize targeting based on expected incremental revenues.

items.description: Spatiotemporal Geographically Weighted Machine Learning (GWML) Framework: A Methodological Innovation for Decoding Driving Mechanisms and Zoned Optimization of Rural Settlement Evolution

items.description: Axion is a machine learning framework designed to be simple and fast.

items.description: Leakage-aware and calibration-sensitive machine learning framework for reliable healthcare risk prediction.

items.name: A-LightGBM-Based-Static-Analysis-Framework-for-Ransomware-Detection-in-PE-DLL-Files
items.description: Optimized machine  learning solution to static ransomware detection based on  Portable Executable (PE) header features. The research offers a  novel application of LightGBM with high computational  efficiency and detection accuracy, addressing some of the  fundamental challenges in modern cybersecurity.

items.name: Advanced-Image-Recognition-for-Black-Rot-in-Mustard-Plants-Using-CNN-Siamese-NN-and-Machine-Learning
items.description: This repository presents a comparative computer vision and machine learning framework for the automated diagnosis of Bacterial Blight / Black Rot in mustard plants, a high-impact agricultural disease caused by Xanthomonas campestris pv. campestris (Xcc).

items.description: End-to-End Machine Learning Framework for House Price Prediction using Zameen.com property listings.

items.name: awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software.

items.name: dgsf-single-machine
items.description: This work presents a hybrid machine learning and optimization framework for single machine non-preemptive total tardiness scheudling problems.

items.name: fair-post-processing
items.description: A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.
